title: sorghum incompletum
intro: Sorghum incompletum, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Sorghum incompletum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Sorghum incompletum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
